div.p: Critical ordering prevents message routing to dead connections
Implementation Rule: Steps 1 → 2 → 3 → 4 MUST be sequential. Closing the socket (4) before unsubscribing (2) allows the Router to attempt writes to a closed file descriptor.

text.tspan: Steps must execute in this exact sequence
✅ No topic has this client in subscriber map
✅ No delivery goroutines running for client
route messages to this dead client
